title: The Underground Team Moves
description: Pages 16–20 focus on the underground team moves, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Marines, Unknown person #6 as luffy meets Sabo again, entrusts him with the Colosseum fight, and the operation against Doflamingo moves forward.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Uwaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa a a a a a a a a a a a a aahhh...

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: The Marines are mistaking us for toys in the town!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: We nearly got found out....!! All because of your weird taste in animal outfits!! Too weird!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Eh? These should be very common, particularly Luffy's.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Are you finished crying yet Luffy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Do you still want to go save law!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: There's no problem with the 'fire fruit' anymore...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Robin seems to be in this country...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: been a while, I really want to see her...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: You have found him already? That's great!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: I thought when he saw me he'd punch me straight away.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: ....even if you were "there", what could you have changed?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: ...there's no answer to a question like that.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Let me know when you have information on the situation underground.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: I have to go get ace's 'fire fruit' back!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: I really never thought he would still be alive...

summary: The Underground Team Moves focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Marines as luffy meets Sabo again, entrusts him with the Colosseum fight, and the operation against Doflamingo moves forward.
